creator: brion@queeg.com
text:
I've put xtide.tar.gz in ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/,
	so that it can be verified and added to the ports collection.

	The port works fine except that fetching the file from the author's
	web site seems to fail, so we may need to have the source tarball
	mirrored at cdrom.com.

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/x11
	tar xzf /path/to/xtide.tar.gz
	cd xtide
	make install
